articles.title: Aberdeen Group plc Purchases 21,662 Shares of The Kroger Co. $KR
articles.summary: Aberdeen Group plc has increased its stake in The Kroger Co. by 5.5%, acquiring an additional 21,662 shares. This purchase brings their total holdings to 414,587 shares, representing approximately 0.07% ownership valued at $25.9 million. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus for Kroger, with an average target price of $74.56, following a recent earnings beat and dividend announcement.

articles.title: Aberdeen Group plc Boosts Holdings in Kimberly-Clark Corporation $KMB
articles.summary: Aberdeen Group plc increased its stake in Kimberly-Clark Corporation (KMB) by 19.6% in the fourth quarter, now holding 287,841 shares valued at approximately $29.04 million. Kimberly-Clark recently raised its quarterly dividend to $1.28 per share, resulting in an annualized dividend of $5.12 and a yield of 5.3%. The company currently has an average analyst rating of "Hold" with a target price of $115.85.

articles.title: What stores are open Easter Sunday? Are Walmart, Trader Joe's open or closed today? Here's a list
articles.summary: This article provides a list of major retailers and stores that are expected to be open or closed on Easter Sunday 2026, including Walmart and Trader Joe's. While many stores like Walmart and Trader Joe's will be open, others such as Target, Costco, and Sam's Club are likely to be closed. It also advises customers to call their local stores to confirm holiday hours.

articles.title: Dollar Tree Now Stocks This Italian Olive Oil—and It’s the Cheapest We’ve Seen
articles.summary: Dollar Tree is now carrying Bertolli Extra Virgin Olive Oil in 8.45-ounce bottles for $3.75, making it significantly cheaper per ounce than at other major retailers like Kroger, Target, and Walmart. This new offering comes as Dollar Tree has raised its prices, allowing the store to stock higher-quality products at competitive prices. The article highlights the value of this deal for shoppers looking to save on cooking staples amidst rising grocery costs.

articles.title: Florida Trust Wealth Management Co Grows Holdings in Costco Wholesale Corporation $COST
articles.summary: Florida Trust Wealth Management Co. increased its stake in Costco Wholesale Corporation by 2.5% during the fourth quarter, reflecting a positive sentiment from institutional investors who collectively own 68.48% of the company's stock. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $1,039.13, supported by Costco's strong financial performance, strategic expansions, and membership-driven growth. Despite some insider selling, the company continues to outperform with solid fundamentals, including a recent EPS and revenue beat.

articles.title: Is Costco open or closed on Easter? Here's what to know
articles.summary: This article provides information on which grocery and retail stores will be open or closed on Easter Sunday, April 5, 2026. Costco, Sam's Club, Target, Aldi, and Publix are among the stores confirmed to be closed. However, many other grocery chains like Walmart, Kroger family stores, and Trader Joe's, as well as retailers like Home Depot and Sephora, will be open.

However, many other grocery chains like Walmart, Kroger family stores, and Trader Joe's, as well as retailers like Home Depot and Sephora, will be open.

articles.title: Target opens massive 55th N.J. location, bringing 280 jobs to the community
articles.summary: A new 150,000-square-foot Target store has opened in West Orange Plaza, marking its 55th location in New Jersey and creating approximately 280 jobs. The store offers various services including drive-up, in-store pickup, and same-day delivery, and is part of a larger redevelopment project at the shopping center that includes new leases with other businesses. The redevelopment aims to enhance shopping options for the Essex County community.

articles.title: Target opens massive new West Orange location with 280 jobs
articles.summary: A new 150,000-square-foot Target store recently opened in West Orange Plaza, creating approximately 280 jobs and expanding shopping options for the Essex County community. This is Target's 55th location in New Jersey and includes features such as drive-up service, a CVS pharmacy, and a Starbucks cafe. The opening is part of a larger redevelopment effort by Levin Management Corp. at the plaza.

articles.title: Is Walmart Open on Easter 2026? Details on Holiday Hours
articles.summary: Walmart stores will be open during normal business hours on Easter Sunday, April 5, 2026, with the exception of locations in Maine which close due to state law. Target, Costco, and Aldi will be closed, but other stores like BJ's Wholesale Club, Dollar General, Home Depot, Kroger, Trader Joe's, and Whole Foods will also be open with varying hours. Customers are advised to check local store hours for confirmation.

Customers are advised to check local store hours for confirmation.

articles.title: Perigon Wealth Management LLC Has $16.61 Million Stake in Walmart Inc. $WMT
articles.summary: Perigon Wealth Management LLC reduced its stake in Walmart Inc. by 14.6% in the fourth quarter, selling 25,446 shares but still holding 149,110 shares worth $16.61 million. Walmart reported strong Q4 earnings, beating estimates with $0.74 EPS and $190.66 billion in revenue, and set positive FY2027 guidance. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with a target price of $135.76.

articles.title: Federal Realty: The King of Dividend Growth
articles.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) is highlighted as a top dividend growth stock, having increased its dividend for 58 consecutive years, making it the only REIT on the Dividend Kings list. The company's strong performance is attributed to its portfolio of strategically located strip malls and mixed-use properties, active asset management focused on redevelopment and strategic sales, and an attractive dividend yield of 4.2%. Analysts from Scotiabank and Truist have recently updated their price targets for FRT, maintaining positive to hold ratings.

articles.title: Ulta Beauty Launches Erly Skincare To Test Minimalist Demand And Loyalty
articles.summary: Ulta Beauty is launching Erly Skincare, a dermatologist-founded brand, nationwide on April 19, in 750 stores and online. This move targets Gen Z and Gen Alpha with minimalist, hypoallergenic products, expanding Ulta's skincare offerings and testing demand for simpler routines. The launch also allows Ulta to gain early access to brand equity and potentially boost loyalty among younger shoppers.

articles.title: Director at Target (NYSE: TGT) receives 1,791-share equity award
articles.summary: Target Corporation director Stephen B. Bratspies was granted an equity award of 1,791 shares of common stock, reported via a Form 4 filing. These shares were awarded at $0.00 per share as compensation under the company's 2020 Long-Term Incentive Plan, increasing his direct holdings to 1,791 shares. This transaction is categorized as a compensation grant rather than a market purchase, aligning the director's interests with long-term company performance.

articles.title: Target Corp (TGT) director Stephen Bratspies files Form 3 insider report
articles.summary: Target Corp director Stephen B. Bratspies has filed a Form 3 insider ownership report for TGT, indicating his new role as a director. The filing shows no reported transactions, exercises, gifts, or other movements in Target securities. A Form 3 is an initial statement of beneficial ownership, meaning it reports his entry into the role and not any stock activity.
